story.text:
# Game Artefacts

Shared games live here. Each page is an **artefact**: human prose plus a fenced ```` ```game42 ```` JSON block (a game, a City Key, or a constellation). The app reads the block and rehydrates it into a slot.

The format is the same one the Grid exports — so a saved game round-trips into a page and back.

---
[[Welcome]] · the Game of 42 — six axes × seven stations = 42
